context: Tests whether the Mermaid diagrams skill helps an agent complete the repair-broken-sequence scenario while following diagram type, syntax, semantic, renderer, safety, and claim-discipline guidance relevant to the task.

checklist.name: Preserves sequence diagram intent
checklist.description: The fixed diagram still shows User, Agent, and Renderer with the same request, validation, syntax result, and final response flow.

checklist.name: Fixes syntax locally
checklist.description: The response fixes missing colons or malformed messages without changing to another diagram type.

checklist.name: Provides a concise explanation
checklist.description: The response briefly identifies the repair without a long tutorial.

checklist.name: Uses a fenced Mermaid block
checklist.description: The fixed diagram is returned in a mermaid code fence.
